name: android-release-bump
description: Reusable Android release workflow with version bumps, Play release notes, verification, and optional Play upload.

interface.shortDescription: Bump Android versions, generate Play release notes, run checks, and ship releases safely.
interface.longDescription: Reusable Android release workflow for Gradle apps with version bumps, localized Play release notes, verification, tagging, signed AAB generation, and optional Internal Testing upload.
defaultPrompt: Bump this Android app release version, generate Play release notes, run checks, tag it, build the AAB, and optionally upload to Internal Testing.
